import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    MAX_VAL = 501
    MAX_XOR = 512
    
    reachable = [0] * MAX_VAL  # bitmask
    cum = [0] * (MAX_VAL + 1)  # cum[v] = union of reachable[0..v-1]
    
    for val in a:
        # XOR each value in cum[val] with val
        new_mask = 1 << val  # single element
        c = cum[val]
        while c:
            lsb = c & (-c)
            x = lsb.bit_length() - 1
            new_mask |= 1 << (x ^ val)
            c ^= lsb
        
        added = new_mask & ~reachable[val]
        if added:
            reachable[val] |= added
            for v in range(val + 1, MAX_VAL + 1):
                cum[v] |= added
    
    ans_mask = 1  # include 0 (empty subsequence)
    for v in range(MAX_VAL):
        ans_mask |= reachable[v]
    
    result = [i for i in range(MAX_XOR) if (ans_mask >> i) & 1]
    print(len(result))
    print(*result)

solve()
